introduction-description:
Say goodbye to your heavy backpack! Carry a simple tablet or your smartphone and access all your school content from anywhere!
Wherever you are you can access your notes, check homework, manage absences, check the week's subjects, send and receive messages with students and teachers, study and much more! You will never have to remember to bring specific materials to school because everything will always be with you.
what-is-description:
A wonderful future for every school in the world!
Join the best website for digital school management and be among the first to try the new features on offer.
Taking notes, planning events and sharing files between users are just some of the many features available.
Our goal is to make school materials more affordable and to make learning easier and more fun through the use of the most modern technologies.
for-whom-student:
Students

LightSchool is the ideal place for every student. Teachers registered on the portal provide free materials you can use to study and learn. You can also upload files, take notes, manage your calendar, class schedule and much more.
for-whom-teacher:
Teachers

Teachers can benefit greatly from LightSchool. You can create classes and manage your students, send them quizzes, chat and discuss in the class private forum. Teachers can also upload materials exclusively for their students, or choose to make materials public for everyone!
for-whom-everyone:
Everyone

If you do not fit into either of the previous categories, you may still find that LightSchool can be useful for you. The free material made available by teachers from around the world is an important resource for everyone, not just students.
get-started-login:
Login

Already have an account? Just sign in!
get-started-register:
Register

If you are a new user, you need to create an account before accessing the services offered by the platform.
maintenance-mode: Maintenance in progress. We will be back online shortly.
tos-text:
1. Acceptance of Terms

By registering for or using LightSchool, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use the service.

2. Description of Service

LightSchool is a free educational platform that allows users to create and manage notes, files, diary events, timetables, messages, and contacts, and to share content with other registered users.

3. Eligibility

You must be at least 16 years old to use LightSchool. If you are under 18, you represent that a parent or guardian has reviewed and agreed to these Terms on your behalf.

4. Account Registration

  • You must provide accurate and complete registration information.
  • You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your credentials.
  • You are solely responsible for all activity under your account.
  • Notify us immediately at lightschool@francescosorge.com of any unauthorized use.

5. Acceptable Use

You agree not to:

  • Upload or transmit content that is unlawful, harmful, defamatory, obscene, or invasive of another’s privacy.
  • Impersonate any person or entity.
  • Attempt to gain unauthorized access to the service or other accounts.
  • Use the service to transmit unsolicited messages (spam).
  • Interfere with or disrupt the integrity or performance of the service.
  • Circumvent any security measures of the service.

6. User Content

You retain all rights to content you create on LightSchool. By uploading content, you grant LightSchool a limited licence to store and deliver that content solely to provide the service to you. We do not claim ownership of your content.

7. Data Security

LightSchool encrypts notebook content and protects your data as described in the Privacy Policy. You are responsible for your own device and account security.

8. Service Availability

LightSchool is provided “as is” without warranty of any kind. We do not guarantee uninterrupted or error-free operation. We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue the service at any time, with reasonable notice where possible.

9. Account Suspension and Termination

We may suspend or terminate accounts that violate these Terms at our sole discretion. You may delete your account at any time from your account settings; deletion is completed within 30 days.

10. Limitation of Liability

To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, LightSchool and its operator are not liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages. Our total liability shall not exceed the amount paid by you for the service, which is zero as the service is free.

11. Changes to Terms

We may update these Terms at any time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated date. Continued use of the service constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms.

12. Governing Law

These Terms are governed by Italian law. Any disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of Italian courts.

13. Contact

For questions regarding these Terms, contact us at: lightschool@francescosorge.com.
privacy-policy-text:
1. Data Controller

The data controller is Francesco Sorge, reachable at lightschool@francescosorge.com. LightSchool is an educational platform operated as an individual project.

2. Data Collected

We collect and process the following categories of personal data:

  • Registration data: first name, last name, email address, username, and a hashed password.
  • User-generated content: notebooks, diary entries, timetable items, contacts, files, and messages created by you and stored on our servers.
  • Usage data: IP address, browser type, pages visited, and timestamps, collected automatically when you use the service.
  • Settings and preferences: language preference, theme, accent colour, profile picture, and taskbar configuration.
  • Two-factor authentication data: an encrypted TOTP secret, if you choose to enable 2FA.

3. Legal Basis for Processing

We process your personal data on the following legal bases, pursuant to Article 6 of Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR):

  • Performance of a contract (Art. 6(1)(b)): to provide and operate the LightSchool service.
  • Compliance with a legal obligation (Art. 6(1)(c)): where required by applicable law.
  • Legitimate interests (Art. 6(1)(f)): to ensure platform security, prevent fraud, and improve the service.

4. Purposes of Processing

  • Providing and operating the LightSchool service.
  • Authenticating users and securing accounts.
  • Sending transactional emails (e.g. email verification, password reset).
  • Storing and delivering user-generated content.
  • Monitoring service health and diagnosing technical issues.

5. Data Retention

Your data is retained for as long as your account is active. Upon account deletion, data is removed within 30 days, except where retention is required by law. Server logs are retained for a maximum of 90 days.

6. Data Security

LightSchool uses end-to-end encryption for notebook content: files are encrypted with AES-256 and the encryption key is protected by your personal RSA-2048 key pair. Passwords are stored as bcrypt hashes and are never stored in plain text. Despite these measures, no system is 100% secure; you are responsible for keeping your credentials confidential.

7. Data Sharing and Third Parties

We do not sell, trade, or rent your personal data to third parties. Your data is not shared with third parties except:

  • When required by law or by a competent authority.
  • If you enable optional integrations (e.g. Microsoft Office Online for document editing), the relevant third party’s privacy policy applies to data processed by that service. Microsoft’s privacy statement is available at privacy.microsoft.com.

8. Cookies

We use only technically necessary cookies:

  • Session cookie: keeps you logged in during your browser session.
  • Language cookie: stores your preferred display language.

No tracking, advertising, or third-party analytics cookies are used.

9. Your Rights

Pursuant to Articles 15–22 of the GDPR and the Italian Personal Data Protection Code (D.Lgs. 196/2003 as amended by D.Lgs. 101/2018), you have the right to:

  • Access (Art. 15): obtain a copy of your personal data.
  • Rectification (Art. 16): correct inaccurate or incomplete data.
  • Erasure (Art. 17): request deletion of your data (“right to be forgotten”).
  • Restriction (Art. 18): request that processing be restricted in certain circumstances.
  • Data portability (Art. 20): receive your data in a structured, machine-readable format. You can export your data at any time from Settings → Export Data.
  • Objection (Art. 21): object to processing based on legitimate interests.
  • Withdraw consent: where processing is based on consent, withdraw it at any time without affecting the lawfulness of prior processing.

To exercise these rights, contact us at lightschool@francescosorge.com. We will respond within 30 days.

10. Right to Lodge a Complaint

If you believe your data protection rights have been violated, you have the right to lodge a complaint with the Italian data protection authority (Garante per la protezione dei dati personali), Piazza Venezia 11, 00187 Roma — www.garanteprivacy.it.

11. Changes to This Privacy Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy at any time. The date of the last update is shown at the top of this page. Continued use of LightSchool after changes are posted constitutes acceptance of the updated policy. Where possible, we will notify you by email of significant changes.

12. Contact

For any privacy-related enquiries, contact us at: lightschool@francescosorge.com.
footer-copyright: Website created by Francesco Sorge. All rights reserved.
error-404-description: The page you were looking for may no longer exist or may have been moved.
cookie-bar-description:
We use cookies to track your preferred display language, to record that you have accepted this notice (so we do not show it every time you visit), to allow you to use some of our services (e.g. LightSchool), and some third-party services we include on the site may also save cookies.
If you disagree, you can disable cookies for this website from your browser settings; please note however that the site may not function correctly (or at all).
We may change this notice at any time and without prior notice. You are therefore required to check it periodically and continued use of the site implies acceptance of any changes.
cookie-bar-dialog:
To allow you to read this message, I have already set a cookie for the language and guess what? Your device has not exploded! This should make it clear that cookies are not evil.

Now I present you with two choices: accept cookies and continue browsing the site, or delete the cookies already saved (to be safe, manually delete any remaining cookies) and leave the site (I will take you to Google).
N.B.: You can view the Cookie Policy again by visiting the dedicated page.
welcome-o:
The welcome page gives you quick access to your desktop icons, upcoming high-priority events, and tomorrow's timetable.

The taskbar at the bottom of every page gives you access to LightSchool's main menu and your chosen apps.
file-o:
The File Manager app is the heart of LightSchool, allowing you to take notes, upload files, and organise all your files in convenient folders.

Notebooks are simple note-taking spaces that do not count towards your storage quota, so you can create as many as you like!

You can also upload Office files, images, text, audio, video, programming code and more.
diary-o:
With Diary it is easy to note down homework, tests, and anything else.

You can assign a colour to each event and set a date on which you will receive an email reminder.
timetable-o: Record your weekly lessons in a convenient timetable, assign a colour to each subject, and note the name of the book you need to bring!
share-o: You can share folders, notebooks, files, diary events and contacts with LightSchool users — all you need is their username or to have them saved in your contacts. The number of shares you can make and receive is unlimited!
message-o:
Something unclear and want to ask a classmate or teacher for help? No problem. Use the Messages app and start chatting with anyone!

You can also attach contacts to your messages, making it easy to share your contacts with others.

If the page closes before you send the message you were writing, or if you want to switch conversations, the message will not be lost — it is saved as a draft (accessible only from the device you were using).
contact-o:
The place where you can conveniently save the people you interact with most frequently. You can assign them a name and surname that may differ from what they have set on LightSchool.

Once a contact is saved, the "Sharing" and "Messages" apps will adapt, showing the name and surname you chose.
reader-o:
The Reader app opens notebooks, files, diary events, and contacts.

It can also open PDF files, Office documents (via Microsoft's service) and plain text files!
writer-o: Take notes with Writer and easily attach images and format text just as you would with LibreOffice or Microsoft Office.
settings-o:
Change your name, surname, username, and email. Straightforward — any app or website can do that. What makes LightSchool stand out?

LightSchool lets you change your accent colour (taskbar, buttons, links, etc.), set a wallpaper, and even adjust its opacity and overlay colour! And that's not all!

The taskbar is fully customisable: you can choose its size, which apps to show, and how to order them.
privacy-o:
Plenty of options for privacy enthusiasts and those who want full control over their account. Among the various options, you can enable or disable Office file previews via Microsoft's service.

LightSchool also offers notebook encryption and Two-Factor Authentication to increase your account security.
dark-o:
For dark mode enthusiasts, a dark theme is available by default for all LightSchool apps.

The dark theme will be applied automatically based on the theme used on your device.
launcher-o: Clicking the first icon in the taskbar opens LightSchool's main menu, where you will find all apps (including those not added to the taskbar), a search bar to find files on the current page, and quick links to the welcome page, LightStore, settings and logout.
and-now-o: For more details and information, go to
notebook-d:
A word processor always with you — complete, efficient and free!

All the most used text formatting options are available, such as bold, italic, underline, text size, colour, font, alignments, bullet and numbered lists, superscripts, subscripts and indentation.

You can also add images simply by dragging them into the document at the desired position.

Notebooks can be shared.
file-d:
You can upload any files you want, as long as they are one of these types:

  • Microsoft Office Word (doc, docx)
  • Microsoft Office Excel (xls, xlsx)
  • Microsoft Office Powerpoint (ppt, pptx)
  • OpenDocument Writer (odt)
  • OpenDocument Spreadsheet (ods)
  • OpenDocument Impress (odp)
  • Images (bmp, png, jpg/jpeg, gif)
  • Plain text files (txt)
  • Rich Text Format files (rtf)
and that each does not exceed 1 MB in size.
share-d: Share your notebooks, files, diary events and contacts with other users in one click!
project-d: You can project your notebooks and files onto the classroom whiteboard in one click, with no additional software required on the board. From the board, simply connect
project-d3: and enter the code shown on the board from your device.
test-d: Teachers can create tests and administer them to students. Students can only complete them within the time and conditions set by the teacher.
diary-d:
A test? Homework? A report to submit? No problem — Diary can remember everything!

You can record all the events you want in your personal diary, organise them by type, date, and add details.

Do not feel like checking the diary day by day? No problem! Diary can send you reminders by email.
register-d: Here you will find communications for the family, disciplinary notes, grades, lessons and exam results.
timetable-d: Organise your course subjects by day using the handy and fast tool provided by LightSchool. You can assign each subject a colour and the name of the textbook.
message-d: You can send messages to any user on LightSchool, such as students and teachers, to ask for help, clarification, or simply to chat with the user on the other side of the screen.
contact-d: Add the contacts you interact with most frequently to send messages and share materials faster.
security-d:
Every login, unless configured otherwise, is recorded and you can choose to log out or block devices that have accessed your account.

If you decide to disable the access control feature, you will not be able to log out and block devices, nor will new logins be recorded until you choose to re-enable the feature.

Notebooks are encrypted with RSA PKCS#1 (v2.1) SHA512 and you can enable Two-Factor Authentication to add an extra layer of security to your account.
customize-d: LightSchool offers the maximum customisation possible: you can change bar colours, set a wallpaper, its opacity, and the overlay colour. The taskbar is customisable in size and you can add apps and reorder them.
cross-d: LightSchool is compatible with all browsers (except Internet Explorer, if that even needs saying), operating systems and devices.
easy-d: The menus and sections are perfectly organised for easy use by anyone visiting the site.
free-d: LightSchool is free and always will be.

quotes.text: Fondare biblioteche è come costruire ancora granai pubblici, ammassare riserve contro un inverno dello spirito che da molti indizi, mio malgrado, vedo venire
quotes.author: Marguerite Yourcenar

quotes.text: Il solo vero viaggio, il solo bagno di giovinezza, non sarebbe quello di andare verso nuovi paesaggi, ma di avere occhi diversi, di vedere l'universo con gli occhi di un altro, di cento altri, di vedere i cento universi che ciascuno di essi vede, che ciascuno di essi è
quotes.author: Marcel Proust

quotes.text: Oggi non è che un giorno qualunque di tutti i giorni che verranno. Ma quello che accadrà in tutti gli altri giorni che verranno può dipendere da quello che farai oggi
quotes.author: Ernest Hemingway

quotes.text: Il più bello dei mari è quello che non navigammo. Il più bello dei nostri figli non è ancora cresciuto. I più belli dei nostri giorni non li abbiamo ancora vissuti. E quello che vorrei dirti di più bello non te l’ho ancora detto
quotes.author: Nazim Hikmet

quotes.text: Quando la tempesta sarà finita, probabilmente non saprai neanche tu come hai fatto ad attraversarla e a uscirne vivo. Anzi, non sarai neanche sicuro se sia finita per davvero. Ma su un punto non c'è dubbio. Ed è che tu, uscito da quel vento, non sarai lo stesso che vi è entrato
quotes.author: Murakami

quotes.text: Preferisco una sconfitta consapevole della bellezza dei fiori, piuttosto che una vittoria in mezzo ai deserti, una vittoria colma della cecità dell'anima, di fronte alla sua nullità separata
quotes.author: Fernando Pessoa

quotes.text: Leggendo non cerchiamo idee nuove, ma pensieri già da noi pensati, che acquistano sulla pagina un suggello di conferma
quotes.author: Cesare Pavese

quotes.text: Ecco il mio segreto. È molto semplice: si vede solo con il cuore. L'essenziale è invisibile agli occhi
quotes.author: Antoine de Saint-Exupéry

quotes.text: I passi che compi non devono essere grandi, devono semplicemente portarti nella direzione giusta
quotes.author: Jemma Simmons, Agents of S.H.I.E.L.D.

quotes.text: Discriminando, generi solo odio
quotes.author: The Black Eyed Peas

quotes.text: "Ciao" è una parola che pronunciamo spesso distrattamente, senza coglierne il senso profondo. Ci si dice "ciao" quando ci si vede, ma anche quando ci si saluta: "ciao" è la premessa di un incontro che si rinnova, il piccolo motore di un riconoscersi che può diventare, via via, conoscenza, relazione, amicizia, collaborazione e condivisione
quotes.author: Don Luigi Ciotti

quotes.text: Dio ci ha donato la memoria, così possiamo avere le rose anche a dicembre
quotes.author: J.M. Barrie

quotes.text: Ogni mare ha un'altra riva.
quotes.author: Cesare Pavese

quotes.text: I sentieri si costruiscono viaggiando
quotes.author: Franz Kafka

quotes.text: Viaggiare è dare un senso alla propria vita, viaggiare è donare la vita ai propri sensi
quotes.author: Alexandre Poussin

quotes.text: Un paese è, per me, un sorriso, un'accoglienza, un nome, molto più che delle città, delle montagne, delle foreste o delle rive
quotes.author: Pierre Fillit

quotes.text: In viaggio, la cosa migliore è perdersi. Quando ci si smarrisce, i progetti lasciano il posto alle sorprese, ed è allora, ma solamente allora, che il viaggio comincia
quotes.author: Nicolas Bouvier

quotes.text: Viaggiare significa aggiungere vita alla vita
quotes.author: Gesualdo Bufalino

quotes.text: In tibetano la definizione di "essere umano" è a-Go ba, "Viandante", "Chi fa migrazioni"
quotes.author: Bruce Chatwin

quotes.text: Il miglior modo per cercare di capire il mondo è vederlo dal maggior numero di angolazioni possibili
quotes.author: Ari Kiev

quotes.text: Si viaggia non per cambiare luogo, ma idea
quotes.author: Hippolyte Adolphe Taine

quotes.text: I viaggi cominciano molto prima degli autobus, degli aerei, degli elicotteri, delle navi, dei piedi. I viaggi cominciano dentro la testa. È lì che ci si deve spostare, altrimenti, niente si muove
quotes.author: Simona Vinci

quotes.text: Non c'è niente come tornare in un luogo che non è cambiato per rendersi conto di quanto sei cambiato
quotes.author: Nelson Mandela

quotes.text: Quando aiuto la gente che ha fame mi dicono che sono un bravo prete. Quando domando perché quella gente ha fame mi chiamano comunista
quotes.author: Don Andrea Gallo

app-not-purchased-d: Application not associated with your account. Go to LightStore to get or purchase it.
no-desktop: No files added to the desktop. Hover over a file in the File Manager, right-click (or long-press) and select "Add to Desktop".
no-next-events: No events in the next 7 days or with high priority.
otp-deactivate: To deactivate Two-Factor Authentication, enter the username you registered with.
otp-error: Unable to deactivate Two-Factor Authentication. Check that the URL is correct or start the procedure again.
otp-deactivated: Two-Factor Authentication deactivated. We recommend re-enabling it as soon as possible.
recover-pwd-ok: Password reset successfully. Your new password is:
recover-pwd-error: Unable to reset password. Check that the URL is correct or start the procedure again.
recover-pwd-text: To recover your password, enter the username you registered with.
register-text: Register for free to access all the educational tools available.
name: Name
verify-error: Unable to activate account. Try using the link sent to your email (check spam folder). If it still does not work, please contact support.
no-app: No apps added to your account. Go to
deactivate-opt-ok: Procedure started successfully. Check your email.
deactivate-opt-user: User not found. The username may be incorrect or may not have Two-Factor Authentication enabled.
login-error2-otp: Unable to verify the OTP code.
login-error: Username and password cannot be empty!
login-error5: You have not verified your email address. Click the link sent to your email (check spam). If you do not receive it within 30 minutes, contact us
twofa-text: Procedure completed successfully. The next time you log in, you will also need to provide the temporary code generated by your app, right after entering your username and password correctly.
twofa-error: Invalid token entered. Try again or restart the procedure.
contact-no-longer-exists: This contact no longer exists on LightSchool
cookie-bar-notice: We use cookies to improve your experience and remember your preferences.
register-error-username-short: Username must be at least 4 characters long.
register-error-password: Password is too simple. It must be at least 8 characters and not obviously common.
register-error-email-taken: An account with this email already exists.
register-success-text: Your username is :username. Please check your inbox (and spam folder) at :email for a verification link.
register-error-keys: IMPORTANT: Something went wrong creating your encryption keys. Contact support before logging in.
password-reset-request-text: If an account with that username exists, a recovery email has been sent.
password-reset-too-short: Password must be at least 8 characters.
password-reset-success: Password changed successfully. You can now log in.
otp-user-not-found: User not found or two-factor authentication is not enabled.
email-verify-body:
Thanks for signing up. Click the button below to verify your email and activate your account.

If you did not create an account, ignore this message.
email-password-body:
We received a request to reset the password for your account.

Click the button below to set a new password. This link expires in 1 hour.

If you did not make this request, you can safely ignore this email.
email-otp-body:
We received a request to disable two-factor authentication on your account.

Click the button below to confirm and proceed.

If you did not make this request, secure your account immediately.
email-button-not-working: Button not working? Copy this link:
login-suspended: Your account has been suspended. Contact support.
login-session-expired: Session expired. Please log in again.
verify-link-not-found: Verification link not found or already used.
verify-link-expired: Verification link has expired. Please register again.
verify-email-success: Email verified successfully. You can now log in.
twofa-session-expired: Session expired. Please reload the page.
settings-success-saved-verify: Settings saved. Please verify your new email address.
timetable-error-slot-occupied: This time slot is already occupied.
writer-error-file-not-found: File not found or not owned by you.
writer-error-folder-not-found: Folder not found or not owned by you.
writer-error-name-exists: A file with this name already exists in this folder.
message-error-self: Cannot send a message to yourself.
message-error-privacy: Privacy settings prevent messaging this user.
email-deletion-pending-body:
We have received a request to delete your account on :app.

Deletion will be completed on :date. You have until that date to cancel by simply logging in to your account.

If you did not make this request, log in immediately to cancel it.
email-deletion-cancelled-heading: Your deletion request has been cancelled
email-deletion-cancelled-body:
Your account deletion request on :app has been successfully cancelled following your login.

Your account is safe and will not be deleted.
email-deletion-completed-body:
Your account on :app and all associated data have been permanently deleted.

If you were not aware of this, please contact support.
email-data-export-ready-heading: Your export is ready for download
email-data-export-ready-body:
Your personal data export on :app is ready.

Click the button below to access the secure download page. You will be asked to enter your password before downloading.

The link is valid for 7 days and can only be used once.
export-already-pending: You already have an active export. Check your e-mail or wait for it to complete.
export-requested: Export started. You will receive an e-mail when it is ready.
export-not-available: This export is not available for download (it may be expired or already downloaded).
export-wrong-password: The password you entered is incorrect.
export-file-not-found: The export file could not be found. Please request a new export.
export-failed-desc: An error occurred while preparing your archive. Please try again by requesting a new export from settings.
export-downloaded-desc: This download link has already been used and is no longer valid.
export-expired-desc: This download link has expired (valid for 7 days). Please request a new export from settings.
export-ready-desc: Your archive is ready. Enter your password to download your data. The link will expire on :date and can only be used once.
settings-error-delete-already-pending: You already have a pending deletion request.
settings-success-delete-requested: Deletion request submitted. You will receive a confirmation email.
too-many-requests: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
settings-storage-full: You have run out of storage space. LightSchool features will be limited until you free up some space.
settings-storage-almost-full: Storage is almost full. We recommend deleting files you no longer need.
settings-nav-app-desc: Add/Remove apps from the taskbar or clear data
settings-nav-customize-desc: Color, profile picture, background and taskbar
settings-account-email-hint: If you change your email address, we will send a confirmation to the new address.
settings-account-username-hint: Your username allows other users to find you on LightSchool without sharing personal information such as your email.
settings-customize-accent-hint: The primary color is applied everywhere in LightSchool — taskbar, buttons, windows, icons and more.
settings-customize-profile-picture-hint: Go to "File Manager" to choose a profile picture.
settings-customize-background-hint: Go to "File Manager" to choose a background image.
settings-customize-taskbar-reorder-hint: Drag the icons directly in the taskbar to reorder them. To add or remove apps, go to "Settings > Apps".
settings-customize-taskbar-empty: No apps in the taskbar. Go to "Settings > Apps" to add apps.
settings-security-2fa-description: Make your account more secure by requiring a one-time code at every login. It will only take a couple of minutes.
settings-security-password-never-changed: You have never changed your password.
settings-security-export-desc: Download a copy of all your personal data.
settings-security-privacy-desc: Decide who can send you messages and share documents with you. Choose which personal information to show in your public profile, or choose not to appear in search results.
settings-security-search-visible-hint: Disabling this option will prevent other users from finding you by name and surname.
settings-security-show-email-hint: Disabling this option will prevent other users from finding you by email address, and it will not appear on your profile page.
settings-security-show-username-hint: Disabling this option will prevent other users from finding you by username, and it will not appear on your profile page.
settings-security-all-hidden: Disabling all options will mean your profile is never shown within the "Social" app.
settings-security-interactions-desc: Choose who can send you messages and share documents with you.
settings-security-third-party-desc: Authorise or deny the use of third-party services by LightSchool.
settings-security-ms-office-hint: Use Microsoft Office Online, when possible, to preview doc, xls, ppt, docx, xlsx and pptx files.
settings-password-desc: Enter your current password and your new password twice. After the change, we will send you a notification email.
settings-delete-warning-desc: This action will start a permanent deletion process for your account and all your data. You have 30 days to change your mind: simply log in to your account again to cancel the request.
settings-delete-cancel-confirm: Are you sure you want to cancel the deletion request?
settings-delete-pending-desc: Your account is scheduled for deletion on :date. You can cancel at any time by logging into your account or clicking the button below.
settings-export-archive-ready-desc: Your export is ready for download. The link will expire on :date and can only be used once.
settings-export-processing-desc: You will receive an email as soon as your file is ready to download.
settings-export-desc: Download a copy of all your personal data: files, notes, diaries, contacts, messages and timetable. The archive will be prepared in the background and you will receive an email when it is ready.
settings-export-valid-for: The download link is valid for 7 days and can only be used once.
settings-2fa-intro: Follow these simple steps to configure Two-Factor Authentication on your LightSchool account.
settings-2fa-step1-desc: There are many free apps for Android and iOS. Download one to continue.
settings-2fa-step2-desc: Open the app you chose and add a new account. Then scan the QR Code or manually enter the code.
settings-2fa-enter-code: Enter the code exactly as shown below
settings-2fa-step3-desc: At this point, the app should show you a 6-digit temporary one-time code. Enter the code to verify that the configuration procedure was successful.
settings-2fa-active-notice: You are already using Two-Factor Authentication. Congratulations!
settings-2fa-deactivate-question: Do you want to disable Two-Factor Authentication on this account?
settings-2fa-deactivate-warning: For security reasons, we ask for your password before disabling Two-Factor Authentication. Remember that you can always re-enable it from your account security settings, but you will have to redo the procedure from scratch.
settings-app-clear-data-confirm: Delete all data for this app? This action cannot be undone.
app-not-available-desc: This application is not currently available.
home-learn-more: Want to learn more? Check the overview.
settings-language-desc: Choose the language used throughout the app, including emails and notifications.
passkey-error: Passkey authentication failed. Please try again.
passkey-session-expired: Session expired. Please refresh and try again.
passkey-register-failed: Failed to register passkey. Please try again.
passkey-desc: Passkeys let you sign in using your device (fingerprint, face, PIN, or a hardware key) instead of your password. They are more secure and skip two-factor authentication.
passkey-none: You have no passkeys registered yet.
passkey-name-modal-desc: Give this passkey a name so you can recognise it later.
settings-security-passkeys-desc: Use passkeys to sign in without a password.
